examples: He suspected that deep down, she admired him for having the gumption to disagree with her.
Surely anyone with marketing gumption should be able to sell good books at any time of year.
A teacher saw her gumption and mentored her.
It takes guts and gumption to put aside partisanship in favor of good governance.
But gumption turned into contempt, and it would have been interesting to see the stages.
